# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page React application built with TypeScript and Vite. It follows a component-based architecture with:

- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with functional components and hooks
- **Routing**: React Router for client-side navigation
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for global state
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with a design system based on shadcn/ui
- **Backend Integration**: Supabase for database, authentication, and serverless functions

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Component Organization
- **UI Components**: Reusable primitives in `src/components/ui/` (buttons, forms, dialogs, etc.)
- **Feature Components**: Domain-specific components organized by feature (evaluations, leave, settings)
- **Layout Components**: App shell components (AppLayout, Sidebar, TopBar)

### Data Flow
- **Queries**: TanStack Query for fetching data from Supabase
- **Mutations**: Direct Supabase client calls for data modifications
- **Real-time**: Supabase subscriptions for live updates

### Authentication & Authorization
- **Auth**: Supabase Auth with role-based access control
- **Roles**: employee, team_lead, hr_manager, ceo with different permission levels
- **Access Control**: Role-based visibility and feature access throughout the app

## Core Business Logic

### Employee Evaluations
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Comprehensive performance reviews with scores, comments, and recommendations
- **Daily Evaluations**: Quick feedback between employees with directional ratings
- **Timeline View**: Chronological display of all evaluations with filtering based on user role

### Leave Management
- **Leave Types**: Configurable leave categories (vacation, sick, etc.)
- **Balance Tracking**: Automatic calculation of remaining leave days
- **Approval Workflow**: Request submission and approval process

### Settings & Configuration
- **Company Settings**: Basic company information
- **Departments & Roles**: Organizational structure management
- **Expense Categories**: Configurable expense types for reimbursement
- **Evaluation Parameters**: Scoring criteria and rating scales

### Notifications
- **Automated Notifications**: System-generated alerts for HR events
- **Role-based Recipients**: Targeted notifications based on user roles
- **Email Integration**: Supabase Edge Functions for email delivery

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Entrypoints
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap and React root rendering
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main page component with routing setup

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar with user menu
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variant support
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: Enhanced NavLink with active state styling

### Feature Components
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx`: Displays evaluation history with role-based filtering
- `src/components/leave/ApplyLeaveModal.tsx`: Modal for submitting leave requests
- `src/components/settings/CompanyTab.tsx`: Company information management
- `src/components/hr-policies/RichTextEditor.tsx`: Rich text editor for policy documents

### Utilities and Hooks
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for className merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission checking
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: TypeScript types for database schema

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS customization
- `supabase/config.toml`: Supabase project configuration

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `employees`: User accounts with role and company association
- `companies`: Company information
- `evaluations`: Quarterly performance reviews
- `daily_evaluations`: Daily feedback entries
- `leave_requests`: Leave application records
- `leave_balances`: Employee leave entitlements
- `departments`: Organizational departments
- `roles`: User roles and permissions
- `expense_categories`: Reimbursable expense types

### Relationships
- Employees belong to companies and departments
- Evaluations link employees to evaluators
- Leave requests reference leave types and approval status
- Daily evaluations have reviewer/reviewee relationships

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- **Linting**: ESLint configuration
- **Type Checking**: TypeScript strict mode
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for e2e tests
- **Code Style**: Prettier integration

### Build Process
- **Development**: Vite dev server with hot reload
- **Production**: Optimized build with code splitting
- **Deployment**: Static site deployment to hosting platforms

### Database Management
- **Migrations**: SQL files in `supabase/migrations/` for schema changes
- **Edge Functions**: Serverless functions in `supabase/functions/` for business logic
- **Local Development**: Supabase CLI for local database setup

## Common Patterns and Conventions

### Component Props
- Interface definitions for all component props
- Optional props with sensible defaults
- TypeScript strict typing throughout

### API Calls
- TanStack Query for data fetching with caching
- Error handling with user-friendly messages
- Loading states with skeleton components

### Styling
- Tailwind utility classes
- CSS custom properties for design tokens
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Dark mode support

### State Management
- Local component state for UI concerns
- Context for global app state (auth, theme)
- Server state managed by TanStack Query

This technical context should help AI assistants understand the codebase structure, patterns, and business logic for effective code analysis and documentation generation.
